about.heroSubtitle: For over 15 years, Binayah has matched clients with exceptional homes and high-yield investments across Dubai, powered by AI and guided by experts.
about.storyP1: Founded with a vision to redefine real estate in Dubai, Binayah Properties has grown from a boutique agency to one of the city's most respected property consultancies.
about.storyP2: We specialize in off-plan developments, luxury resale properties, property management, and investment advisory. Our team of multilingual experts understands the diverse needs of a global clientele.
about.storyP3: Today, we combine traditional real estate expertise with AI-driven market intelligence to deliver unparalleled service and results.
about.value1Desc: Every decision we make is guided by the best interests of our clients.
about.value2Desc: We believe in honest communication and full transparency in every transaction.
about.value3Desc: Deep knowledge of Dubai's real estate landscape across all segments.
about.value4Desc: Leveraging AI and cutting-edge technology to deliver smarter property solutions.
about.value5Desc: We uphold the highest ethical standards in every interaction.
about.value6Desc: Committed to delivering exceptional service at every touchpoint.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.label: FAQ
faq.q1: How do I buy property in Dubai as a foreigner?
faq.a1: Foreigners can purchase freehold property in designated areas of Dubai. You'll need a valid passport, and no residency visa is required. Binayah guides you through the entire process — from selecting the right property to property registration and handover.
faq.q2: What is off-plan property and is it a good investment?
faq.a2: Off-plan properties are purchased directly from developers before or during construction, typically at lower prices than ready properties. They offer flexible payment plans (often 60/40 or 70/30) and strong capital appreciation potential. Dubai's off-plan market has historically delivered 20-40% returns by handover.
faq.q3: What are the costs involved in buying property in Dubai?
faq.a3: The main costs include: 4% property transfer fee, 2% agency commission, AED 4,200 registration admin fee, and approximately AED 5,000-10,000 for NOC and trustee fees. There is no property tax, capital gains tax, or income tax on rental yields in Dubai.
faq.q4: Can I get a Golden Visa through property investment?
faq.a4: Yes. Investing AED 2 million or more in Dubai real estate qualifies you for a 10-year Golden Visa. The property can be off-plan or ready, and you can combine multiple properties to meet the threshold. Binayah can help you identify Golden Visa-eligible properties.
faq.q5: What rental yields can I expect in Dubai?
faq.a5: Dubai offers some of the highest rental yields globally, averaging 5-8% net. Areas like JVC, Dubai Silicon Oasis, and International City can yield 8-10%, while premium locations like Dubai Marina and Downtown average 5-7%. Our Pulse dashboard provides live yield data by area.
faq.q6: How does Binayah's property management service work?
faq.a6: Our full-service property management includes tenant sourcing, rent collection, maintenance coordination, DEWA/Ejari setup, and regular property inspections. We charge a competitive management fee and handle everything so you can enjoy hassle-free rental income.

privacyPolicy.heroSubtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.body: Binayah Properties LLC ('Binayah', 'we', 'us', or 'our') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services. Please read this policy carefully. If you disagree with its terms, please discontinue use of the site.

dataCollected.title: Information We Collect
dataCollected.body: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the site, express an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and services, or otherwise contact us. This includes your name, email address, phone number, and any messages you send. We also automatically collect certain information when you visit our site, such as your IP address, browser type, referring URLs, and pages viewed.

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUse.body: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services; to send you property listings, market updates, and promotional materials you have opted into; to respond to your inquiries and provide customer support; to comply with legal obligations in the UAE, including RERA regulations; and to detect and prevent fraud or unauthorized activity on our platform.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete the personal information we hold about you. You may also object to certain types of processing or request that we restrict our use of your data. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@binayah.com. We will respond to all requests within 30 days in accordance with applicable UAE data protection law.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@binayah.com, or write to us at Binayah Properties LLC, Marasi Drive, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE.

termsOfService.heroSubtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our platform.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using the Binayah Properties website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable UAE laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you are prohibited from using this site. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the service.

useOfService.title: Use of Service
useOfService.body: You may use this site only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to use this site to engage in any conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone's use or enjoyment of the site, or that could harm Binayah Properties or users of the site. You must not transmit any unsolicited or unauthorised advertising or promotional material, any junk mail, or any other form of similar solicitation.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: The content on this site, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of Binayah Properties LLC and is protected by UAE and international copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works without our prior written consent. Property listings are provided for personal, non-commercial informational use only.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: Binayah Properties provides property information on an 'as is' basis without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of listing information. To the fullest extent permitted by UAE law, Binayah Properties shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this site or reliance on any information provided herein.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.body: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Emirate of Dubai and the applicable federal laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Dubai courts. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and such changes will be effective immediately upon posting.

pulseGuides.guide_dubaiAbuDhabi_desc: Two different investment propositions. We compare transaction volume, yield, appreciation, and liquidity to help you decide.

dubaiEmirate.title: Dubai Real Estate
dubaiEmirate.lede: Live transaction data, community rankings, rental yields, and investment highlights for the Dubai property market.
dubaiEmirate.chartEmpty: Not enough data for this chart yet
dubaiEmirate.why1Sub: The UAE constitution enshrines no personal income tax. Rental income, capital gains, and dividends are all tax-free for individuals.
dubaiEmirate.why1Source: UAE Ministry of Finance · Federal Tax Authority
dubaiEmirate.why2Headline: 7–9% gross yields — highest among global prime cities
dubaiEmirate.why2Sub: Dubai consistently delivers 2–3× the gross rental yield of London, New York, or Singapore at comparable price points.
dubaiEmirate.why2Source: CBRE Global Living Report · Knight Frank Prime Global Cities Index
dubaiEmirate.why3Headline: Over 200 nationalities — the most international city on Earth
dubaiEmirate.why3Sub: A 30-year planned urban expansion (D33 Agenda) targets 5.8M residents by 2030. Sustained population growth is the primary demand driver.
dubaiEmirate.why3Source: Dubai Statistics Centre · Dubai 2040 Urban Master Plan
dubaiEmirate.why4Headline: Freehold ownership since 2002 — full title with Golden Visa
dubaiEmirate.why4Sub: Property purchases above AED 2M qualify for a 10-year renewable Golden Visa, extending residency rights to family members.
